finding: Runner-sync commands require operators to discover required surfaces and option combinations through CLI help/trial, including release accepting actor positionally and not `--task`.
expectedBehavior: The first-layer skill/playbook should reveal the exact enqueue/build/release command sequence and valid option surface so agents do not need exploratory CLI calls during governed delivery.
evidenceOrRepro: During ATM-GOV-0186, `framework-mode release` did not accept `--task`; the operator had to query `framework-mode --help` and rerun with the correct actor surface.
followUp: Update runner-sync/framework-mode source skills and generated integration entries with explicit copy-paste commands, including release syntax, receipt-ref handling, and common failure recovery.
